item.title: Dr. Phil’s most chilling interview yet: Zachary Davis
item.description: Highlights from Dr. Phil’s interview with Zachary Davis, focusing on the key topics discussed and the insights shared during the conversation.

media:content.media:title: Dr. Phil’s most chilling interview yet: Zachary Davis
media:content.media:description: Highlights from Dr. Phil’s interview with Zachary Davis, focusing on the key topics discussed and the insights shared during the conversation.

item.title: Betrayed by Friends: The Kaytlin Root Case
item.description: An overview of the case involving Kaytlin Root, examining key events and the role of her friends, presented factually and respectfully for viewers.

media:content.media:title: Betrayed by Friends: The Kaytlin Root Case
media:content.media:description: An overview of the case involving Kaytlin Root, examining key events and the role of her friends, presented factually and respectfully for viewers.

item.title: A Small Town Passing That Shook A Community
item.description: A factual look at the passing of an individual in a small town, exploring the impact on the community, responses from residents, and the broader social effects of the loss.

media:content.media:title: A Small Town Passing That Shook A Community
media:content.media:description: A factual look at the passing of an individual in a small town, exploring the impact on the community, responses from residents, and the broader social effects of the loss.
